definition.visible_unique_scenario: A paired Stay/Swerve scenario after excluding respondent/session/order/choice/presentation fields; uses only the outcome text-relevant fields Barrier, CrossingSignal, and the 20 character counts for each action.
definition.feature_unique_scenario: A paired Stay/Swerve scenario using the visible fields plus MM scenario metadata columns ['PedPed', 'AttributeLevel', 'ScenarioTypeStrict', 'ScenarioType', 'DefaultChoice', 'NonDefaultChoice', 'DefaultChoiceIsOmission', 'NumberOfCharacters', 'DiffNumberOFCharacters'].
